assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md contains a table with all 7 supported versions (2.1.0, 2.1.1, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4) each showing 'NO' in the Affected? column. Each version ships serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135). The summary states: 'Result: NO supported version is affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Case C — Close as Not a Bug' and under section '3. Close Issue': 'Transition TC-8002 to Closed with resolution Not a Bug.' Section 'Steps Skipped or Not Applicable' confirms: 'Step 8 Case A/B (Remediation Tasks): Not applicable — no remediation needed since no versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '2. Post Triage Comment' includes a comment with a version impact table listing each version (2.1.0 through 2.2.4) alongside its serde_json version (1.0.137-1.0.139) and 'NO' for each, with the summary: 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '4. Set VEX Justification' states: 'Component not Present — the vulnerable version of the package (serde_json < 1.0.135) is not included in any supported product version.' It also shows the field is configured as customfield_12345 and provides the Jira API call to set the value.

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: No remediation tasks appear anywhere in the outputs. triage-outcome.md explicitly states: 'Step 8 Case A/B (Remediation Tasks): Not applicable — no remediation needed since no versions are affected.' The proposed Jira actions consist only of correcting Affects Versions, posting a comment, closing the issue, setting VEX justification, and adding a label — no task creation.
